title: Cloud Security Posture Management Market Expected to Reach USD 15.62 Billion by 2035 | SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) market was valued at $5.96 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach $15.62 billion by 2035, growing at a 10.14% CAGR. The market expansion is driven by rapid cloud adoption outpacing manual security management capabilities, with cloud misconfiguration being the leading cause of breaches. North America leads the market with the U.S. representing $2.38 billion, while Europe is projected to reach $4.23 billion by 2035. Large enterprises and BFSI sectors dominate, though SMEs and healthcare are the fastest-growing segments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Recognized as one of the leading CSPM platform providers globally. The company's 2023 introduction of Prisma Cloud Darwin with AI-powered attack path analysis demonstrates continued innovation and competitive strength in the growing market.

title: HYDAWAY DIGITAL APPOINTS CYBER SECURITY INDUSTRY VETERAN TO ADVISORY BOARD
author: Prnewswire
description: Hydaway Digital Corp. announced the appointment of Angelo Valentini, Head of Channel Sales at Check Point Software Technologies, as a strategic advisor. Valentini will help advance Hydaway's RealityChek cybersecurity platform and advise on strategic initiatives related to cybersecurity and deepfakes detection.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Check Point is mentioned only as the current employer of the newly appointed advisor. The mention is factual and contextual, providing background on Valentini's credentials without any direct business implications for Check Point itself.

title: Threat Intelligence Market: USD 18.85 Billion by 2031 with Strategic Intelligence Segment Accounting for 33.60% Revenue Share – Reports Mordor Intelligence
author: Mordor Intelligence
description: The global threat intelligence market is projected to grow from USD 10.38 billion in 2026 to USD 18.85 billion by 2031, registering a 12.7% CAGR. Growth is driven by rising cyberattacks, AI-powered threat detection adoption, and increasing demand for real-time cybersecurity monitoring across BFSI, healthcare, government, retail, and IT & telecom sectors.

title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. - CHKP
author: Pomerantz Llp
description: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against Check Point Software Technologies following the company's disclosure of go-to-market changes that negatively impacted Q1 2026 product revenue and 2026 revenue projections. The announcement triggered a 19.64% stock price decline on April 30, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company disclosed unexpected go-to-market changes that created near-term headwinds in its security appliance business and negatively affected 2026 revenue projections. This triggered a significant 19.64% stock price decline and prompted a securities fraud investigation by a major law firm, indicating potential undisclosed material information or misleading statements to investors.

title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. - JKS
author: Pomerantz Llp
description: Pomerantz Law Firm is investigating securities fraud claims against JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. following the company's April 16, 2026 earnings report that revealed a $214.5 million GAAP loss driven by a $200+ million non-cash impairment charge, contradicting positive statements made by officers during the November 2025 earnings call. JinkoSolar's ADR price fell 11.89% on the news. Similar investigations are being initiated against Meridian Corporation and Check Point Software Technologies Ltd.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is under investigation for securities fraud and misleading statements. A $214.5 million GAAP loss driven by a $200+ million impairment charge contradicted prior positive guidance, resulting in an 11.89% stock price decline.
Company is under investigation by Pomerantz LLP for unspecified claims, indicating potential securities violations or corporate misconduct.
